channel.title: Blind-Ssrf on Classroom
channel.description: Recent content in Blind-Ssrf on Classroom

item.title: SSRF: Server-Side Request Forgery - Practitioner Guide
item.description: Server-Side Request Forgery makes the server issue requests of your choosing — into its own internal network, cloud metadata, or back at itself. It’s a perennial OWASP Top 10 entry and one of the highest-impact bug bounty classes because it pivots from the internet straight into the trust zone behind the firewall. (It’s also the SSRF I referenced from the OAuth request_uri/discovery surface.)
